severity_rationale: Active peatland fire, ~4 m flame front, dense low smoke. No structures involved yet. Wind pushing plume toward a kampung ~2 km southeast.
immediate_action: Pre-warn downwind kampung. Stage water tanker access. Monitor wind shift; peat fires can spread underground beyond the visible front.
routing_rationale: Peat-fire downwind exposure risk; deep-lane synthesis can correlate with FIRMS satellite signal.
